title: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

basic_details.job_title: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for Female/SC/ST/Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.details: B.Sc. in Physics/Applied Physics/Materials Science/ Nanoscience with minimum 55% or equivalent marks M.Sc. in Physics/Applied Physics/Materials Science/ Nanoscience with minimum 55% or equivalent marks CSIR-UGC NET Qualified including lectureship or GATE qualified Prior experimental research experience will be preferred. Practical experience in Raman spectroscopy, Optical Microscopy, Scanning Electron Microscopy, and UV-Vis spectroscopy is preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹ 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (1st & 2nd year), ₹ 43,000/- p.m. + HRA (3rd year)
salary_details.details: 1st and 2nd year: ₹ 37,000/- p.m. + HRA 3rd year: ₹ 43,000/- p.m. + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at Banaras Hindu University is 06 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Physics, Applied Physics, Materials Science, or Nanoscience with at least 55% marks. Additionally, a CSIR-UGC NET or GATE qualification is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable for female candidates, SC, ST, and Physically Handicapped individuals.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow is ₹ 37,000/- p.m. + HRA for the first and second years, and ₹ 43,000/- p.m. + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the Google Form link provided in the Important Links section. Ensure all required documents are uploaded correctly.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by an in-person interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does BHU offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, BHU offers an age relaxation of 5 years for Female, SC, ST, and Physically Handicapped candidates applying for the JRF position.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Required documents include a CV, self-attested copies of degree certificates, a one-page summary of your Master's thesis, and the names and emails of at least one referee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of this job at BHU?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research job at Banaras Hindu University, specifically for the position of Junior Research Fellow (JRF).
